mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND customer_type = #{customerType}
AND del_flag = '0' AND history = '1'

SELECT c.check_out_record_id AS id, cu.customer_name AS customerName, cu.check_in_date AS checkInDate, c.check_out_date AS checkOutDate, CASE WHEN c.type = '0' THEN '正常退住' WHEN c.type = '1' THEN '死亡退住' WHEN c.type = '2' THEN '保留床位' ELSE '未知状态' END AS checkOutType, c.reason AS checkOutReason, c.examing_date AS approvalTime, s.user_name AS approvalPerson, CASE WHEN c.status = '0' THEN '通过' WHEN c.status = '1' THEN '不通过' WHEN c.status = '2' THEN '已提交' WHEN c.status = '3' THEN '未提交' WHEN c.status = '4' THEN '已撤销' ELSE '未知状态' END AS approvalStatus, r.building AS buildingNumber, r.room_no AS roomNumber, b.bed_no AS bedNumber FROM check_out_record c LEFT JOIN customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id LEFT JOIN user s ON c.examing_by = s.user_id LEFT JOIN bed b ON cu.bed_id = b.bed_id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.room_id
AND cu.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND c.check_out_date IS NOT NULL AND c.del_flag = '0'
ORDER BY c.check_out_record_id DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_out_record c LEFT JOIN customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id
AND cu.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND c.del_flag = '0'

SELECT c.outing_record_id AS id, cu.customer_name AS customerName, c.expected_return_date AS returnDate, c.outing_date AS outingDate, c.reason AS outingReason, c.examing_date AS approvalTime, s.user_name AS approvalPerson, c.real_return_date AS actualReturnDate, CASE WHEN c.status = '0' THEN '通过' WHEN c.status = '1' THEN '不通过' WHEN c.status = '2' THEN '已提交' WHEN c.status = '3' THEN '未提交' WHEN c.status = '4' THEN '已撤销' ELSE '未知状态' END AS approvalStatus, r.building AS buildingNumber, r.room_no AS roomNumber, b.bed_no AS bedNumber FROM outing_record c LEFT JOIN customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id LEFT JOIN user s ON c.user_id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN bed b ON cu.bed_id = b.bed_id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.room_id
AND cu.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND c.outing_date IS NOT NULL AND c.del_flag = '0'
ORDER BY c.outing_record_id DESC limit #{pageStart}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outing_record c LEFT JOIN customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id
AND cu.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND c.outing_date IS NOT NULL AND c.del_flag = '0'

SELECT c.customer_id AS id, c.customer_name AS customerName, c.age, c.gender, r.building AS buildingNumber, r.room_no AS roomNumber, b.bed_no AS bedNumber, l.nursing_level_name AS nursingLevel FROM customer c LEFT JOIN nursing_level l ON c.nursing_level_id = l.nursing_level_id LEFT JOIN bed b ON c.bed_id = b.bed_id LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.room_id
AND c.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND c.del_flag = '0' AND c.user_id IS NULL AND c.customer_type = '1'
ORDER BY c.customer_id DESC limit #{pageStart}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer c
AND c.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND c.del_flag = '0' AND c.user_id IS NULL AND c.customer_type = '1'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO nursing_item_record (customer_id, nursing_item_id,nursing_item_code,nursing_item_name, execution_cycle, execution_times, purchasing_date, purchasing_times, expiration_date, status) VALUES
(#{item.customerId},#{item.nursingItemId},#{item.nursingItemCode},#{item.nursingItemName}, #{item.executionCycle}, #{item.executionTimes}, #{item.purchasingDate}, #{item.purchasingTimes}, #{item.expirationDate}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT n.nursing_item_id AS id, n.code AS code, n.nursing_item_name AS name, n.execution_cycle AS executionCycle, n.execution_times AS executionTimes, n.code AS code, n.status AS status FROM nursing_item n WHERE n.nursing_item_id = #{itemId} AND n.del_flag = '0'
select customer_id from customer where id_number = #{idNumber} and del_flag = '0'
select * from customer c where id_number = #{idNumber} and c.del_flag = '0'
